articles.title: Flare to Airdrop Canary Network Token to XRP Holders

articles.title: Mastercard and Circle Partner to Trial USDC Settlements
articles.description: Mastercard will test utilizing USDC as a means for card issuers to settle payments and transactions on its platforms.

articles.title: Uniswap (UNI) to Be Allocated 49.95% of Grayscale’s New DeFi Fund
articles.description: Grayscale Investments is has launched a new DeFi fund The DeFi fund will provide investors with weighted exposure to the top 10 DeFi tokens according to market cap They include Uniswap (UNI), Aave (AAVE), Compound (COMP), Curve (CRV), MakerDAO (MKR), SushiSwap (SUSHI), Synthetix (SNX), Yearn Finance (YFI), UMA Protocol (UMA) and Bancor (BNT) Uniswap will be allocated the lions share of the fund...

articles.description: Ether continues to trade lower under the shadow of Bitcoin in days leading up to its supply-crunching hard fork event.

articles.title: Crypto Analyst Predicts 430% Rally for Ethereum, Says Bitcoin Flippening Likely – Here’s When
articles.description: A popular crypto trader and analyst is suggesting that Ethereum’s price could jump 430% by 2022. The trader, known as Capo, says that he is betting on Ethereum (ETH) over Bitcoin (BTC) if the crypto market enters a new bullish period. He also bets that ETH will flip BTC’s market cap and become the top-ranked […]
